choose.when:
INSERT INTO instructions WITH (ROWLOCK)(task_id, subtask_id, sequence, protocol, device_id, commands, params, status, remark, message_event, created_at, updated_at, event_logic)
SELECT #{item.taskId}, #{item.subtaskId}, #{item.sequence}, #{item.protocol}, #{item.deviceId}, #{item.commands, typeHandler=cn.aitplus.wcs.infra.config.CommandListTypeHandler}, #{item.params}, #{item.status}, #{item.remark}, #{item.messageEvent}, #{item.createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.eventLogic,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM instructions WHERE subtask_id = #{item.subtaskId} AND sequence = #{item.sequence})
